# CWE-322 safe — Key Exchange without Entity Authentication (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-322-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/tls"
	"crypto/x509"
	"io"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func ExchangeSessionKey(c *gin.Context) ([]byte, error) {
	pool, err := x509.SystemCertPool()
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	if pem := os.Getenv("RELAY_CA_PEM"); pem != "" {
		pool.AppendCertsFromPEM([]byte(pem))
	}
	peerHost := c.PostForm("relay_host")
	conn, err := tls.Dial("tcp", peerHost, &tls.Config{
		MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS12,
		RootCAs:    pool,
		ServerName: peerHost,
	})
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	defer conn.Close()
	if err := conn.VerifyHostname(peerHost); err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return io.ReadAll(conn)
}
